intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current physical state. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/bare soil. P3 (Pothos) is present but severely compromised. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Critical/Terminal (Pothos leaf present, but detached or dying)

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; no visible botanical life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot; no visible botanical life.
plant_audit.P3: Single leaf remaining in black pot with white rabbit anchor; leaf shows signs of chlorosis and necrosis.
plant_audit.P4: No evidence of Silver Guest specimen.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells in P3; white rabbit anchor is present but isolated.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-4: Minimal change; P3 leaf remains in situ.
temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: P3 leaf shows slight postural decline.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Significant loss of visibility; lighting conditions obscure the specimen.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Specimen in P3 appears to have collapsed further into the soil.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Total loss of structural integrity; the plant is effectively non-viable.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of terminal collapse. The lack of foliage and the presence of debris (eggshells) suggest a failed propagation or a neglected environment. The Pothos leaf is the only remaining biological marker and is in a state of decay.
vision_report.anomalies: The introduction of crushed eggshells is a non-standard intervention that has not yielded positive growth results.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical collection has suffered a catastrophic failure. Starting from the earliest image, the pots were already sparsely populated. Over the 5-day observation period, the remaining Pothos leaf in P3 has undergone progressive senescence. The other pots (P1, P2, P4) have remained devoid of life throughout the sequence. The environment is currently non-productive.
